title: Metroid
action_mood_cue: standing in a hostile alien cavern under atmospheric light
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Action-Adventure game.

A lone armored explorer in a futuristic industrial skyline or reactor zone with cold light and scale, standing in a hostile alien cavern under atmospheric light.

Game metadata:
- Title: Metroid
- Platform: Nintendo Entertainment System
- Release year: 1987
- Secondary genre signal: Fantasy

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second

Style:
- restrained retro poster aesthetic, simple shapes, limited palette, readable silhouettes, 8-bit spirit without actual sprites
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- futuristic, urgent, cold, focused

Composition:
- one subject slightly left of center, with a clean silhouette and a world behind it that explains the genre immediately
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: avoid resemblance to metroid, no official character likeness, no copyrighted costume replication, no original enemy designs, no game logo, no UI elements, no screenshot recreation, no exact box art composition, no branded symbols, no text, no abstract shapes, no decorative geometry, no empty background
legal_notes: Risk level high; use generic subject archetypes, readable environments, and platform-coded style only. Downgrade if likeness risk rises.
